intent: Remove byox_ladder from the monorepo after extracting it to its own GitHub repo (kuhyx/build-your-x), where it gained a byox progress tracker + crdt_sync sync alongside the builds.
scope: Delete python_pkg/byox_ladder/ (moved to https://github.com/kuhyx/build-your-x with full git history)
Update CLAUDE.md 'Extracted to their own repos' list
Drop the now-stale byox_ladder codespell exclude in .pre-commit-config.yaml
Non-goal: no behaviour change to any remaining monorepo package
changes: git rm -r python_pkg/byox_ladder (generator + tests + built pages)
CLAUDE.md: add build-your-x to the extracted-repos list
.pre-commit-config.yaml: remove the guide-ladder.html codespell exclude + its stale comment

verification.evidence: No remaining references to byox_ladder anywhere in the monorepo after removal.
71 passed, 100.00% branch coverage in kuhyx/build-your-x (pre-push gate).

risks: byox_ladder had no cross-package imports, so no remaining package depends on it.
Derived, gitignored artifacts (guides.json, byox-readme.md) were regenerable and copied into the new repo's checkout.
rollback: Clone https://github.com/kuhyx/build-your-x and restore byox_ladder/ under python_pkg/ with imports rewritten back to python_pkg.byox_ladder.*
